name: New Momentum Corp.
summary: PART I DESCRIPTION OF BUSINESS Our Corporate History and Background The Company was incorporated on July 1, 1999, under the laws of the State of Nevada, under the name Han Logistics, Inc. On August 6, 2015, the Company changed its name to Eason Education Kingdom Holdings, Inc. On June 18, 2020, the Company changed its name to New Momentum Corporation. Amee Han Lombardi served as President, Secretary, Treasurer and a director from July 1, 1999 until her resignation on February 13, 2015. Michael V...
